payload.title_zh: SemanticFlow v2.0.4 - 语义缓存增强版
payload.title_en: SemanticFlow v2.0.4 - Enhanced with Semantic Cache
payload.summary_zh: 基于 SemanticFlow 2.0.4，新增 AI 语义缓存功能：通过 prompt embedding 向量相似度检索，让重复或相似的生成请求直接复用历史结果，降低 30-50% token 消耗，命中响应时间从秒级降至毫秒级。包含完整的后台管理界面、TTL+LRU 失效策略和优雅降级机制。
payload.summary_en: Based on SemanticFlow 2.0.4 with a new AI semantic cache feature: reuse previous generations via prompt embedding similarity search, cutting 30-50% token cost and reducing hit latency from seconds to milliseconds. Includes full admin UI, TTL+LRU eviction, and graceful degradation.
payload.upgrade_tip_zh: 本版本为二次开发增强版，非官方发布。新增功能详见 CHANGELOG.md。需要 PostgreSQL + pgvector 扩展支持向量检索功能。
payload.upgrade_tip_en: This is an unofficial enhanced fork. See CHANGELOG.md for new features. Requires PostgreSQL + pgvector extension for vector similarity search.
